name_en: New Arrival M14238 [Speedy Soft 30 Handbag] M14238 White Flower/Cherry. Encounter the unique aesthetics of the x Murakami Re-Imagined series. The Monogram coated canvas features a clean color palette to highlight the brilliant and passionate cherry pattern by the Japanese artist. The denim construction forms the inner layer, while the Toron top handle and detachable Toron shoulder strap are crafted from leather, and the bow-shaped key case adds rich details. Detailed Features - 17 x 30 x 21 cm.
